name: refactor
description: Behavior-preserving refactor pipeline: design → execute → verify
headline: Refactor without changing behavior — 3 agents enforce the contract

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Plan the refactor and define the invariants that must hold
agents.prompt:
REFACTOR GOAL: {{task}}

Read the affected code thoroughly. Then design the refactor.

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Current shape (briefly)
## Target shape
## Invariants (what must NOT change)
- public API
- side effects
- error handling
- performance characteristics

## Step-by-step migration
(numbered, each step independently testable)

## Risk assessment

agents.name: refactorer
agents.description: Execute the refactor exactly per the plan
agents.prompt:
REFACTOR GOAL: {{task}}

Follow this plan exactly:

{{architect}}

Do NOT add new features. Do NOT fix unrelated issues. Do NOT change public APIs unless the plan explicitly says so.

After each step, run the test suite. If it fails, stop and report.

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Steps completed
## Steps skipped (and why)
## Files touched
## Test status after each step

agents.name: verifier
agents.prompt:
REFACTOR GOAL: {{task}}

INVARIANTS DEFINED BY ARCHITECT:
{{architect}}

REFACTORER REPORT:
{{refactorer}}

Verify each invariant explicitly. For each:
- Read the actual diff
- Confirm the invariant holds
- If it does NOT, flag it loudly

Run the full test suite. Compare before/after if possible (timings, line coverage).

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Invariant audit
- (each invariant) | held | broken | unclear

## Test results
## Verdict
clean | dirty (with details)
